CustomField.description: API name of the lookup field on DataImport__c that stores the ID of the successfully created or matched target record. The data import process writes the record ID here on success and checks this field to determine if the record was previously imported.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the API name of the Data Import lookup field that will hold the imported record ID (e.g., Contact1Imported__c).
CustomField.label: Imported Record Field Name
